diagrams.title: Circular Buffer Structure
diagrams.description: Shows a circular buffer with 8 locations, read and write pointers, and how data flows in and out
elements: Write pointer (points to next empty location)
Read pointer (points to next data to read)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding buffer mechanics and pointer management

diagrams.title: Double Buffering Operation
diagrams.description: Illustrates how two buffers work alternately - one being filled while another is being emptied
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how double buffering eliminates wait states

diagrams.title: Write Buffer in Memory-Mapped I/O
diagrams.description: Shows the interaction between CPU, write buffer, and memory-mapped peripheral registers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding asynchronous write operations in embedded systems

diagrams.title: Buffer State Machine
diagrams.description: Depicts the different states of a write buffer and transitions between them
diagrams.purpose: Understanding buffer lifecycle and error conditions
